mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` (order_id, agent_id, type, token_address, token_symbol, amount, price, status, buyer_wallet, seller_wallet, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{agentId}, #{type}, #{tokenAddress}, #{tokenSymbol}, #{amount}, #{price}, #{status}, #{buyerWallet}, #{sellerWallet}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `order` WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND status IN ('ACTIVE', 'COMPLETED') ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM `order` WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE `order` SET buyer_wallet = #{buyerWallet}, seller_wallet = #{sellerWallet}, status = #{status}, transaction_hash = #{transactionHash}, chain_order_id = #{chainOrderId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
